data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat2_2F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat2_2F_Text_DevonWasTinyI: Way back in the old days, DEVON was just\na teeny, tiny company.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat2_2F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat2_2F_Text_MyDaddyMadeTh: My daddy's working at the CORPORATION.\pMy daddy made this!\nBut I can't use it, so you can have it.
data/maps/RustboroCity_Flat2_2F/text.inc.RustboroCity_Flat2_2F_Text_GoingToWorkAt: My daddy's working at the CORPORATION.\pWhen I grow up, I'm going to work for\nDEVON, too.
